sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105883" key="tumbou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμβοῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n105883.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">placed on a tomb, sepulchral,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Κήρ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.154</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
